mapper.select: SELECT t.dept_hier AS deptHier, t.full_path AS fullPath, t.dept_name AS deptName, b.emp_name AS empName, b.emp_id AS empId FROM (SELECT dept_id, dept_name, LPAD(' - ', 8 * (LEVEL - 1), ' ') || dept_name AS dept_hier, SUBSTR(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(dept_name, ' > '), 4) AS full_path FROM department START WITH parent_dept_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR dept_id = parent_dept_id) t LEFT JOIN employee b ON t.dept_id = b.dept_id ORDER BY b.dept_id
SELECT dept_id AS deptId, dept_name AS deptName FROM department ORDER BY dept_name asc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (emp_id, dept_id, emp_name, role_id) VALUES (emp_seq.NEXTVAL, #{deptId}, #{empName}, 2)
mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_name AS empName, e.emp_id AS empId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN role r ON e.role_id = r.role_id WHERE e.emp_name = #{name} AND d.dept_name = #{dept}
